reviewReply.comment:

¡Esperamos volver a verte pronto en YPF – ACA Tandil!

reviews.comment:
Deja mucho que desear como socia del Aca y recorriendo el pais la atención cero y los baños no te dan las llaves abren solo el de discapacitados y tenes que hacer fila con todo el que pasa y va a los sanitarios

(Translated by Google)
It leaves much to be desired as a member of the ACA and traveling the country. The service is nonexistent, and they don't give you the keys to the bathrooms; they only open the one for disabled people, and you have to queue with everyone else who goes to the restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMaVpidjFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es muy mala, parece que te están haciendo un favor, los beneficios de ser socio del ACA en esta estación no existen, no nos dejaron usar el baño, nos enviaron al de discapacitados, que estaba sucio, sin luz y no funcionaba la ceradura de la puerta. Nadie merece usar un baño en ese estado, muy mala predisposición del personal.

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible; it's like they're doing you a favor. The benefits of being an ACA member at this station are nonexistent. They wouldn't let us use the restroom; they sent us to the one for disabled people, which was filthy, had no light, and the door lock didn't work. Nobody deserves to use a restroom in that condition. The staff's attitude was extremely unhelpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMbGVDUzZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre te rebalsan el tanque y te la dejan la moto bañada en nafta, cuando pagas con la aplicación el surtidor te marca un precio y en la aplicación cuando vas a pagar otro, siempre una de más

(Translated by Google)
They always fill up your tank and leave your motorcycle soaked in gas. When you pay with the app, the pump shows you a price, and when you go to pay on the app, there's always one more.
